speaker: speaker1
text: The plumbing in my new apartment is not working .

speaker: speaker2
text: I need you to tell me what the problem is .

speaker: speaker1
text: The bathroom sink is stopped up .

speaker: speaker2
text: Is the kitchen plumbing messed up also , or just the bathroom plumbing ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Just the bathroom plumbing seems to have a problem .

speaker: speaker2
text: Did this just start happening , or has it been going on for a while ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Everything worked beautifully until a few hours ago .

speaker: speaker2
text: Are you going to be home so I can come by and take a look at the problem ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I am not sure if I will be home later .

speaker: speaker2
text: I will be coming by around 10 this morning . If you aren ’ t there , I ’ ll just use my key .
